enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his day in Boulder on December 5, 2016, explaining he missed the previous day's video after staying up late to help his mom move wood. He spent the day working on a 3D reconstruction/tracing project of ancient Rome — currently doing columns and planning the Roman Forum — while listening to a 'History of Byzantium' audiobook.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: excited about progress and eager to start building structures one by one once tracing is complete
finds it frustrating that the Rome simulation keeps pulling you to ground level unexpectedly

claims.claim: I can start building the Roman structures one after the other.

claims.subject: Kyle

claims.subject: Rome
claims.claim: Rome is so active that it always pulls you down to ground level.

claims.claim: I got pulled down to ground level in Rome, right into some statues.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm doing columns right now for the Roman structures.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I thought about how we should rebuild Rome.
